meta.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Peru | Zaltyko - FPG
meta.description: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and FPG licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over FPG athletes, official categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and licenses. National selectivos and tournaments.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations and equipment for 5 apparatus on paper is chaos. Little time for training.
painPoints.specific: Renewing FPG licenses, managing equipment (ropes, hoops, balls, clubs, ribbons), tracking technical levels 1-10.
